howItWorks.title: [VI] Your session, understood.
howItWorks.subtitle: [VI] DevPet runs quietly in the background, turning your coding workflow into meaningful growth.

steps.title: [VI] DevPet detects your session
steps.desc: [VI] Open Cursor, VS Code, or Claude Code — DevPet automatically starts tracking. No setup needed.

steps.title: [VI] Your pet tells the story
steps.desc: [VI] Every prompt, error, and win gets narrated in plain language. Your session becomes a story, not a log.

steps.title: [VI] You level up over time
steps.desc: [VI] Skills unlock, XP accumulates, and weekly insights show exactly how your vibe coding is improving.

features.title: [VI] Everything you need to grow.
features.subtitle: [VI] Built for solo developers who want to understand their workflow, not just track it.

cards.title: [VI] Auto Session Tracking
cards.desc: [VI] Detects Cursor, VS Code, Claude Code, and Ollama automatically. No manual logging.

cards.title: [VI] Skill Tree & XP
cards.desc: [VI] 16 vibe coding skills across four tiers. Earn XP by coding, not by watching tutorials.

cards.title: [VI] AI Mentor Chat
cards.desc: [VI] Your pet knows your session history and skill level. Ask anything — get advice that actually fits.

meetYourPet.title: [VI] Your pet feels what you feel.
meetYourPet.body: [VI] DevPet isn't just a dashboard — it's a companion. Your pet reacts to every moment of your session, celebrating wins and supporting you through the tough parts.
meetYourPet.growthNote: [VI] The pet grows as you grow — starting as a kitten, evolving as your skills level up.

moods.label: [VI] Stuck loop
moods.desc: [VI] Same error three times in a row
